The '''Battle of the Hast Shipyards''' was a battle of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] attack devastated the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Hast Shipyards]].

==The battle==
After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the location of the secret shipyards was discovered by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents.

An Imperial fleet suddenly and brutally attacked the shipyards. The attack inflicted heavy casualties, putting out of commission over twenty [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]], five [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-Bs]], seven [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruisers]], and thousands of personnel.<ref name="DES" />

The battle alone was responsible for pushing back New Republic military plans several years. The captured [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] ''[[Emancipator]]'' and [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']] were at the shipyards at the time awaiting refurbishment. Although they were not damaged in the battle, the shift of priorities put back their work for several years.<ref name="DES" />
